content.fact: The First Battle of Geonosis turns the Separatist crisis into open galaxy-wide war.

entries.title: Dooku Leads Separatists And Serves Sidious

content.fact: During the Clone Wars, Dooku publicly leads the Separatists while secretly serving Darth Sidious as Darth Tyranus.
content.injection: During the Clone Wars, write Dooku as both political face of the CIS and Sith apprentice; most characters know only the public role.

entries.title: Battlefield Victories Do Not Stop Sith Plan

content.injection: Do not let isolated Clone Wars victories imply the Republic is safe from the underlying Sith political trap. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.

content.injection: During the war, write Jedi as strained by command and casualties rather than serenely detached from the conflict.

entries.title: Public Sees Jedi As War Leaders
